tagline: Learn to Code. Build Your Future.

courses.title: Programming Foundations
courses.description: Start here. Learn what code actually is, how the CPU runs it, what memory looks like, and why every language you ever learn afterwards will suddenly make sense.

courses.title: Think Like a Coder
courses.description: Before you write a single line, learn how programmers actually THINK. Decomposition, pattern recognition, abstraction, pseudocode — the invisible skills that decide whether you finish a problem in 5 minutes or get stuck for 5 hours.

courses.title: Reading Code Like a Detective
courses.description: Most platforms teach you to WRITE code. Almost none teach you to READ it. But you will read 10× more code than you write. Become the person who can open an unfamiliar file and understand it in five minutes.

courses.title: Debugging Like a Pro
courses.description: Bugs are not failures — they are the fastest teachers you will ever have. Learn to read error messages, bisect a broken program, follow a stack trace, and find the bug in someone else's code in under five minutes.

courses.title: AI, ML & LLMs from Scratch
courses.description: Stop being afraid of AI. Learn what a neural network actually is (just math), train one in 20 lines of Python, see what a 'token' really looks like, understand why ChatGPT sometimes lies, and build your own tiny chatbot.

courses.title: AI Pair-Programming Etiquette
courses.description: Anthropic's 2026 study showed AI-assisted learners scored 17% LOWER on skill tests than students who struggled alone — unless they used specific habits. Learn the habits that make AI a learning amplifier, not a learning replacement.

courses.title: Python
courses.description: Master Python from scratch — variables, OOP, data science basics, and real projects.

courses.title: Java
courses.description: Build robust apps with Java — OOP, data structures, collections, and APIs.

courses.title: JavaScript
courses.description: From DOM manipulation to async/await. Become a full-stack JS developer.

courses.title: C++
courses.description: Systems programming, pointers, memory management, and competitive coding.

courses.title: HTML & CSS
courses.description: Build beautiful responsive websites from scratch using modern HTML5 and CSS3.

courses.title: SQL
courses.description: Design databases, write complex queries, and master relational data modelling.

courses.title: TypeScript
courses.description: Add types to JavaScript and write safer, larger-scale applications with confidence.

courses.title: React
courses.description: Build fast, interactive UIs with the world's most popular frontend framework.

courses.title: Git & GitHub
courses.description: Master version control — track changes, collaborate with teams, and ship with confidence.
